summary: Optional refresh of FAIL-009 outcome stats and ISS-1423 description to current numbers
detail: PRED-105 silent-ignore pattern continued cleanly between the 2026-04-24T15:53Z and 2026-04-25T03:45Z polls. No new event, no canary, no parameter drift, no infrastructure change. Decider may either (a) bump the stat figures in FAIL-009.outcome and ISS-1423.description to current numbers, or (b) defer until the next material event (the ~07:12Z auto-regen on 2026-04-25 is the next decision point). Both targets carry a single fact-set: "11 consecutive polls of silent-ignore (~7.16d past PRED-105 window close) / 10 byte-identical predictions.html polls / manual-commit drought ~183.7h (7.65d, sustained ~12h past 7-day threshold) / 12 consecutive auto-only commits." Do NOT bump FAIL-009.algorithmic_dimension consecutive-regen counter (still 3) — today's 07:12Z regen has not yet fired at poll time.

affected_targets.change: Stat figures: 10 polls -> 11 polls; 9 byte-identical -> 10 byte-identical; 171.8h/7.16d drought -> 183.7h/7.65d drought; 11 auto-only -> 12 auto-only.
10 polls (~6.66 days) -> 11 polls (~7.16 days); drought "crossed 7 days (~7.16 days)" -> "sustained ~12h past 7-day threshold (~7.65 days)"; 9 byte-identical -> 10 byte-identical.

do_not_open_new_issue: ISS-1423 already covers this pattern; do not duplicate.
watchpoint_for_next_run: The next dome poll after ~07:12Z 2026-04-25 will reveal whether the 4th consecutive ECM Daily Review auto-regen holds 69/10/4 (continuation) or moves to 69/10/5 / 69/9/5 (responsive adjudication). Either outcome justifies a more material patch than this one.
